data.name: Hentai Haruko
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to a world where temptation lives between the lines of art.
Hentai Haruko is not just a puzzle game — it’s a story about desire, tenderness, and a touch of forbidden passion.

Meet Haruko — a young, beautiful, and confident woman who works as a receptionist in a luxurious hotel.
She greets every guest with a smile that’s impossible to ignore and a gaze that promises more than simple courtesy. For her, work is not just a duty — it’s a way to express her sensuality, playfulness, and craving for attention.

Game Features:

  • 30 unique artworks — discover every side of Haruko’s allure, from gentle to seductive.

  • 30 achievements that unveil all facets of her charm.

  • Gallery mode, where you can view every unlocked illustration without limits — slowly, with pleasure, savoring each frame.

Three Difficulty Levels:

  • Easy — 8 pieces, perfect for relaxing and enjoying the art.

  • Normal — 32 pieces, where the real challenge begins.

  • Hard — 200 pieces, for those who crave total immersion in art and temptation.

This game was created to offer not only aesthetic satisfaction but also a pleasant challenge for your mind.
Feel every piece fall into place — as tension and curiosity rise with each completed image.

data.short_description: Dive into a world of temptation with Haruko — a girl who knows how to blend tenderness and passion in every move.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
